<<THE MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ESTIMATORS FOR THE PARAMETERS>>

THE MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ESTIMATORS FOR THE PARAMETERS ARE AS FOLLOWS:

THE MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ESTIMATOR FOR MU_X IS [THE SAMPLE MEAN OF X_i]. THE MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ESTIMATOR FOR MU_Y IS [THE SAMPLE MEAN OF Y_i]. THE MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ESTIMATOR FOR SIGMA_X_SQUARED IS [THE SAMPLE VARIANCE OF X_i]. THE MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ESTIMATOR FOR SIGMA_Y_SQUARED IS [THE SAMPLE VARIANCE OF Y_i]. THE MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ESTIMATOR FOR SIGMA_XY IS [THE COVARIANCE BETWEEN X_i AND Y_i].

TO TEST THE HYPOTHESIS THAT THE DRUG HAS A SIGNIFICANT EFFECT ON REDUCING BLOOD PRESSURE, WE USE THE TEST STATISTIC [THE T TEST STATISTIC]. THE NULL HYPOTHESIS IS [H_0: MU_Y - MU_X = 0]. THE ALTERNATIVE HYPOTHESIS IS [H_1: MU_Y - MU_X ≠ 0]. THE REJECTION CRITERIA IS [IF THE TEST STATISTIC IS LESS THAN -T_CRITICAL OR GREATER THAN T_CRITICAL, THEN WE REJECT H_0].

THE TEST STATISTIC IS [THE T TEST STATISTIC]. THE REJECTION CRITERIA IS [IF THE TEST STATISTIC IS LESS THAN -T_CRITICAL OR GREATER THAN T_CRITICAL, THEN WE REJECT H_0]. THE NULL HYPOTHESIS IS [H_0: MU_Y - MU_X = 0]. THE ALTERNATIVE HYPOTHESIS IS [H_1: MU_Y - MU_X ≠ 0]. THE TEST STATISTIC IS [THE T TEST STATISTIC].
